title: mercuryium
description:
该模组使得MC渲染可以使用更多的线程，提高游戏最低帧，减少卡顿
This mod allows MC rendering to use more threads, improving low FPS in the game and reducing lag
本mod由AI编写，mod by AI
body:
# 中文（zh-cn）
该模组使得MC渲染可以使用更多的线程，提高LOW帧
## 在i7 8550U 16G内存 1模组量 显示器最高刷新率（60hz） 渲染和模拟距离12区块上：
未添加此模组时摇晃视角时**帧数52~60**
添加此模组后摇晃视角时**帧数稳定60左右，不低于55**
### **帧数对比：**
左边原版，帧数有时候波动大；右边安装了本模组，帧数波动小
![左边原版，帧数有时候波动大；右边安装了本模组，帧数波动小](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6576fa12f48512ed476b3a15e8a273188bc60af5.png)
- 环境：azul zulu java25 
- 分辨率：1080x721
## 加入机械动力，1000个小水车和50+个大水车测试：
第一个没有安装本模组，第二个安装了本模组
![这是安装本模组前](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3324f9c3f9be89e19ba694a7038dc5442e2b51c1.jpeg)
![这是安装本模组后](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fa74d9cf39305f8bf75afc266c8d2b145555f86.jpeg)
- 环境：azul zulu java25
- 分辨率：1920x1051
- 生物群系过渡距离15x15
- 图像品质：极佳
- 模拟距离和渲染距离：32区块
- 实体渲染距离：500%
## **本模组和sodium是独立的**
如果喜欢本模组，或者这个模组帮到了您，请[给我买瓶饮料!](https://afdian.com/a/TCGqimingxc)
如果安装模组后帧数没有太大变化，请更改配置文件，把两个值都改为64，并重启游戏
# en-us（英文）
This mod allows Minecraft rendering to use more threads, improving low frame rates
## On an i7 8550U with 16GB of RAM (1 module), maximum monitor refresh rate (60Hz), rendering and simulation distance set to 12 chunks:
When shaking the view without this mod added **Frame rate 52~60**
After adding this mod, when shaking the camera view **The frame rate is stable around 60, not less than 55**
### **Frame rate comparison:**
The left side is the original version, with occasional big frame rate fluctuations; the right side has this mod installed, with smaller frame rate fluctuations
![The left side is the original version, with occasional big frame rate fluctuations; the right side has this mod installed, with smaller frame rate fluctuations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6576fa12f48512ed476b3a15e8a273188bc60af5.png)
- Environment: Azul Zulu Java 25
- Resolution: 1080x721
## Add Create, test 1,000 small water wheels and 50 large water wheels:
The first one did not install this mod, and the second one installed this mod
![This is before installing this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3324f9c3f9be89e19ba694a7038dc5442e2b51c1.jpeg)
![This is after installing this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fa74d9cf39305f8bf75afc266c8d2b145555f86.jpeg)
- Environment: Azul Zulu Java 25
- Resolution: 1920x1051
- Biome transition distance 15x15
- Image Quality: Excellent
- Simulation distance and render distance: 32 chunks
- Entity render distance: 500%
## **This mod and Sodium mod are independent of each other**
If you like this mod, or if this mod has helped you, please [buy me a coffee!](https://afdian.com/a/TCGqimingxc)
If the frame rate doesn't change much after installing the mod, please modify the configuration file, change both values to 64, and restart the game
### _[哔哩哔哩作者主页Bilibili Creator's Homepage](https://space.bilibili.com/1124745658)_
